revision.text: I've never canned or made jam before, but my mother and I are about to make some plum jam with your method. Both of us are sugar sensitive, so we prefer not to use a lot of sugar. Your recipe is nice for that and so many other reasons. Plus, we get to use all the gorgeous plums from our very own plum tree! air max airmax90er.com.
